name: Accura Luxury 39 Motor Yacht
tagline: Elegant and efficient, perfect for intimate gatherings
summary: The Accura 39 offers a refined yachting experience for smaller groups, combining comfort with maneuverability.
description: The Accura Luxury 39 Motor Yacht is ideal for intimate groups seeking a premium yachting experience. With its sleek design and comprehensive amenities, this yacht delivers comfort and style for memorable Bali sea days.
facilities: 1x Toilet with shower, 1x Berth, Sound System, WiFi, Air Conditioning, Snorkeling Equipment, Fishing Tools
safety: Sea Safe Tracking, Life Craft, Life Jackets, Insurance covered by Jasa Raharja Putra
included: Towels, Snorkeling accessories, Fishing equipment, Water, tea, coffee and non-alcoholic drinks
optionalExtras: Transfer, Diving accessories, Surfing accessories, Restaurant lunch at island, Professional photographer, DJ with equipment, Alcoholic drinks, Fresh fruits & snacks
pricingNotes: Nusa Dua 4hrs: Rp 15,000,000 | Nusa Penida/Lembongan 8hrs: Rp 24,000,000
paymentPolicy: 50% deposit required. Full payment before trip. IDR currencies only.
cancellationPolicy: Low season: 50% within 7 days | High season: 50% within 30 days | Within 7 days: 100% | Weather: 25%
